ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Continued To Apr-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Garcia appeared by zoom for Aurelia Rodriguez.

Mr. Garcia stated that he filed the inventory and appraisal earlier this week, that he is working on a petition and that he is anticipating getting it filed by the end of the month. Status on close of estate is continued to April 21, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Garcia is to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by April 14, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
